title: Frost Walker On Lava
description: Frost Walker now works on lava.
body:
# Frost Walker works on Lava

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/iTUl1UXG1cE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Now, the same way frost walker works with water, it will also works on lava (only if frost walker 2), turning the lava block into a temporary magma block.

Made for 1.16,1.17,1.18 and 1.21.x
